title: Desert kites and related constructions
author: Barge, Olivier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset provides the locations of all identified desert kites, along with detailed morphological information for a sample representing approximately 10% of them. It also includes data on other hunting-related structures within the same geographical region. The "Data description.pdf" file explains the content of each feature class.
steps_raw: This dataset provides the locations of all identified desert kites, along with detailed morphological information for a sample representing approximately 10% of them. It also includes data on other hunting-related structures within the same geographical region. The "Data description.pdf" file explains the content of each feature class.
